node.statement: Tr(rho_omega x) >= lambda Tr(x) for x>=0. By GT-hyp rho_omega>=lambda1, so rho_omega-lambda1>=0 (GT-orderunit-def). By GT-trace-psd (self-duality of the positive cone of L(H): a in J^+ iff tr(ab)>=0 for all b in J^+), with a:=rho_omega-lambda1>=0 and b:=x>=0, Tr((rho_omega-lambda1)x)>=0, i.e. Tr(rho_omega x) >= lambda Tr(x).
